# Cadiz

> Geotechnical engineering company in Chile, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Amplificacion Sismica](https://cadiz.mecanicadesuelos.vip/amplificacion-sismica/)
- [Asentamiento Diferencial](https://cadiz.mecanicadesuelos.vip/asentamiento-diferencial/)
- [Asentamientos](https://cadiz.mecanicadesuelos.vip/asentamientos/)
- [Capacidad De Carga](https://cadiz.mecanicadesuelos.vip/capacidad-de-carga/)
- [Cbr Vial](https://cadiz.mecanicadesuelos.vip/cbr-vial/)
- [Cimentaciones](https://cadiz.mecanicadesuelos.vip/cimentaciones/)

## Contact
- Website: https://cadiz.mecanicadesuelos.vip/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in Chile.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
